data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and docs to reflect sprint gap detection and routing
data.description:
## Description
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section and relevant documentation to reflect the 4 detection checkpoints, CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal, REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats, and non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED behavior added by epic 9d3e-957d.

## Implementation
1. Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document:
   - Sprint drift detection at entry (sprint-drift-check.sh)
   - CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN confidence signal (contract: confidence-signal.md)
   - Story validation failure remediation routing
   - Out-of-scope review feedback routing (sprint-review-scope-check.sh)
   - REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED observability format (contract: replan-observability.md)
   - Non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED brainstorm escalation
2. Update CLAUDE.md to reference the new scripts:
   - plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh
   - plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-review-scope-check.sh
3. Update CLAUDE.md to reference the new contracts:
   - plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-signal.md
   - plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md

## test-exempt: no conditional logic
Documentation-only changes. No executable behavior. Any test would be a change-detector asserting string presence in CLAUDE.md.

## Files to Modify
- CLAUDE.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents all 4 detection checkpoints (drift, failure, validation, review)
  Verify: grep -c 'drift\|failure\|validation\|review' CLAUDE.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal
  Verify: grep -q 'CONFIDENT.*UNCERTAIN\|confidence.*signal' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_TRIGGER' CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'REPLAN_RESOLVED' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED handling
  Verify: grep -q 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references new scripts
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-drift-check\|sprint-review-scope-check' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
